title: Suwon, GYE — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Suwon, GYE: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Suwon is a city in GYE with a population of 1,242,000. A historic city just south of Seoul, home to the UNESCO-listed Hwaseong Fortress and Samsung’s global headquarters.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
